item.title: “So I hired myself” got me. Always count on you!
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: As long as the work gets done, I don't care how long you're on-site. Monitor chats from homr and relax :)
item.description: I'm an engineering manager in the semiconductor industry. I'm only 30 years old and the youngest manager by 15 years at my fab. My departments are also the most reliable and efficient with the best team dynamic. My secret is treating all engineers and technicians with empathy and respect and always accommodating their needs. Prior to being the manager, I was the engineer so thankfully am able to perform preventive and corrective maintenance on tools while engineers and techs are enjoying their lives
item.dc:creator: Longdickjohnson69

item.title: Ah yes... science
item.description: So when water is sprayed from the nozzle, it accelerates as it exits, creating a high-speed stream of water. According to Bernoulli's principle, this increase in speed leads to a decrease in pressure in the area around the stream of water being ejected. By positioning this stream of water in the right way outside a window, the device creates a low-pressure zone outside the window or opening. This low-pressure zone is crucial for the firefighting technique. The lower pressure outside the window contrasts with the higher pressure inside the burning room, which is filled with hot gases and smoke. This pressure difference creates an airflow from inside the room towards the outside. Essentially, the room "breathes out" the hot gases and smoke, improving visibility and reducing very quickly the temperature inside.
item.dc:creator: JustAnotherStatistic

item.title: Meme Dump 5 out of 200
item.description:
Hi ~ we're back !
To everyone that's new here
Cuz you know
I've been doing this for almost a week now
Which is like
A super bit commitment
I am cleaning out
My 11k+ meme folder
That I've had
Since 2017
So some of these memes
Are pre-pendemic
And nor "zoomer" humor
But let's just enjoy
The meme dump
And forget
About our problems
For 50 images ♡
It tells me to write a description
For every post
And my brain is small
So I've just been
Typing what ever
Is on my mind
If you haven't noticed
The healer memes
This was a phase
Even though
I'm still a healer main
On many video games
I think during this time
I was big mad
With healing people
Was in my healer villain era
Definitely apart of my lore now
Yesterday I didn't want to cook dinner
So I had "girl dinner"
Which basically means I
Scrummaged through my house
Grabbing handfuls of whatever food
Today
I'm making perogies from scratch
With sausage and caramelized onions
It's my friends bday today
And we're getting together to play
Jackboxs and other games
Then after we're going to watch
Helluva Boss
I'm excited !
Happy Saturday everyone ♡ thank you for joining me on another 11k folder phone cleaning dump. Be kind to yourself and others while the world is ugly ♡
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Images of Note: Just kidding pond fish
item.description:
Sometimes I feel so powerful how people believe I am part of the downfall of civilization.
He's right and we should say it. His name is Oliver Frederick Fenton Spring.
"They hired actors to die for this attack!!" "Why would they hire actors when they could just kill a whole lot of people, these are the fuckers who installed Pinochet, you think they wouldn't kill a whole load of kids?"
Oh come now, Boris Badenov and Natasha Fatale were *far* more competent than Donald Trump.
I mean basically.
All Hail.
The Blog Bog.
I googled "Christ Worshipping Disorder" and I wish I didn't.
nyoom
1920s children's book TADC. The Amazing Analogue Circus
Catbus
Stardew Valley is a very special game and I'm always very tempted to date Abigail.
The idea of letting Elon Musk near my brainparts elicits the same reaction as pouring a Moka pot of coffee fresh from the stove on my genitals does.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: We are losing our girl
item.description: She developed pancreatitis and we found her kidney levels high. The kidneys are either affected by the pancreatitis or her kidneys are failing. After 2 days of treatment she is not responding. I was really hoping to celebrate her 17th this coming July.

item.title: Christofascists: they own your uterus and they own you.
item.description:
These fucks masturbate to the thought of making their minority rule permanent so they can get bet busy owning humans.
https://www.oklahoman.com/story/news/2024/01/26/no-fault-divorce-law-oklahoma-senator-wants-to-end/72354142007/ It is everyone's duty now for the future to once and for all put an end to the gaslighting, fascist, fecal smearing insurrectionists who have thus far escaped appropriate consequences (i.e. the GOP). End the GOP right wing extremism and realign the political spectrum in America. Links to groups supporting democracy and voter rights & access. Please engage and support to the maximal extent you are able: David Hogg's Leaders We Deserve: https://leaderswedeserve.com/ Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight: https://fairfight.com/ Legal Defense Fund: https://www.naacpldf.org/ When We All Vote (Michelle Obama): https://whenweallvote.org/ League of Women Voters: https://www.lwv.org/ Rock The Vote: https://www.rockthevote.org/ HeadCount: https://www.headcount.org/ Poll worker Volunteer: https://workelections.org/ Protect Democracy: https://protectdemocracy.org/donate/ The Brennan Center For Justice: https://www.brennancenter.org/get-involved
item.dc:creator: BodhisattvaDog

item.dc:creator: GuyLuomo

item.title: A weight lifted off my heart.
item.description: I spent a few years trying to understand my gender dysphoria. I didn't share its existence with my wife cause I was scared and in denial. A recent episode had me in diagnostic mode trying to understand what my mind was trying to tell me. It was telling me that I was neglecting a part of myself. It has been 15 hours and I am still numb but I fucking did it. It wasn't the end of my world and I can stop hiding a part of myself. I think that is worthy of my first post. -Thank you all for the love and support! I appreciate all the discussion and enlightenment that the community provided in the comments.
item.dc:creator: J9WorkerDrone
